source_text: 友邦保險的目標是協助大眾實現健康、長久、好生活。
translation: AIA's mission is to help people live healthier, longer, better lives.

source_text: 於2020年，2019冠狀病毒病為我們的社區帶來前所未見的
translation: During 2020, COVID-19 presented unprecedented challenges to our communities.

translation: Notes:

source_text:
(7) 各分部新業務價值包括退休金業務，按當地法定基準列示、未計
入未分配集團總部開支、並且未扣除非控股權益。
translation: (7) New business value for each segment includes retirement business, presented on local statutory basis, before unallocated Group head office expenses and non-controlling interests.

source_text:
(1) 自2017年起，財務資料按12月31日的財政年度結算基準
列報。於2016年的財務資料按11月30日的財政年度結算
基準列報。
translation: (1) From 2017 onwards, financial information is reported on a financial year ended 31 December basis. Financial information for 2016 is reported on a financial year ended 30 November basis.

source_text:
(8) 自2019年起，其他市場的年化新保費及新業務價值包括我們於
Tata AIA Life Insurance Company Limited (Tata AIA Life)所持
49%股權的應佔業績。2018年或以前所呈報的年化新保費及新業
務價值並無重列，並且不包括來自Tata AIA Life的任何貢獻。
自2019年起，本集團新業務價值不包括非控股權益應佔的新業務
價值。2018年或以前的新業務價值並無重列 ，如早前所披露，
並未扣除非控股權益。Tata AIA Life的國際財務報告準則業績乃
採用權益會計法計算。本集團的合併財務報表使用按滯後一個
季度基準的Tata AIA Life財務資料。為明確起見，總加權保費
收入不包括來自Tata AIA Life的任何貢獻。
translation: (8) From 2019 onwards, annualized new premiums and new business value for Other markets include AIA's share of results from our 49% interest in Tata AIA Life Insurance Company Limited (Tata AIA Life). Annualized new premiums and new business value reported for 2018 and prior years have not been restated and do not include any contribution from Tata AIA Life. From 2019 onwards, the Group's new business value excludes new business value attributable to non-controlling interests. New business value for 2018 and prior years has not been restated and, as previously disclosed, was not adjusted for non-controlling interests. Tata AIA Life's IFRS results are accounted for using the equity method. The Group's consolidated financial statements use Tata AIA Life's financial information on a one-quarter lag basis. For clarity, total weighted premiums do not include any contribution from Tata AIA Life.

source_text:
(2) 新業務價值是期間內所售新業務在未來產生的預計稅後法定溢利
按銷售當時計算的現值扣除用作支持新業務而持有超過法定準備
金所需資金的成本。
translation: (2) New business value is the present value of the estimated after-tax statutory profits expected to be generated in the future from new business sold during the period, calculated at the time of sale, less the cost of capital required to support the new business in excess of statutory reserves.

source_text:
(3) 年化新保費是一項衡量新業務水平的指標，以再保險分出前年化
首年保費100%及整付保費10%之總和計算。
translation: (3) Annualized new premiums measures new business level, calculated as 100% of annualized first year premiums plus 10% of single premiums, before reinsurance ceded.

source_text: (4) 所列示的稅後營運溢利已扣除非控股權益。
translation: (4) Operating profit after tax presented is after non-controlling interests.

source_text:
(5) 總加權保費收入包括再保險分出前的續保保費100%，首年保費
100%，以及整付保費10%。
translation: (5) Total weighted premiums include 100% of renewal premiums, 100% of first year premiums and 10% of single premiums, before reinsurance ceded.

source_text:
(9) 友邦保險就確認及計量香港分紅業務的保險合約負債的國際財務
報告準則之會計處理有所變更，以反映保單持有人花紅的預期
變動。2019年之比較資料已作出調整。2018年或以前之比較資料
並無重列。
translation: (9) AIA has changed its IFRS accounting treatment for the recognition and measurement of insurance contract liabilities for Hong Kong participating business to reflect expected changes in policyholder dividends. Comparative information for 2019 has been adjusted. Comparative information for 2018 and prior years has not been restated.

source_text:
(6) 內涵價值是根據對未來經驗的一系列特定假設，以精算方法釐定
壽險業務的估計經濟價值，但不包括任何未來新業務的經濟價
值。內涵價值權益為內涵價值、商譽及其他無形資產的總和。
translation: (6) Embedded value is the estimated economic value of life insurance business determined using actuarial methods based on specific assumptions about future experience, excluding economic value of future new business. Embedded value equity is the sum of embedded value, goodwill and other intangible assets.

translation: the largest initial public offering in the global insurance industry. I am honored to work alongside the Board members. AIA's

translation: for their outstanding management in navigating an unprecedented environment and driving our business forward. We also sincerely thank Mr. Wong King Fai

translation: Environmental, social and governance issues are increasingly important globally. We are committed to helping drive society towards a better future, and our environmental,

translation: social and governance initiatives were again recognized in 2020. According to Sustainalytics' assessment, AIA ranked second among over 270 insurance companies,

source_text: 今天，客戶對友邦保險產品、服務及高質素建議日益增長的需求從未如此殷切。我們的策略建基於亞洲強勁的
translation: Today, customer demand for AIA's products, services and high-quality advice has never been more pressing. Our strategy is built on strong structural growth drivers in Asia,

source_text: 結構性增長動力，並獲多項因素支持，包括前所未見的財富創造、保障缺口迅速擴大、消費者取向持續轉變、
translation: supported by multiple factors, including unprecedented wealth creation, rapidly expanding protection gaps, evolving consumer preferences,

translation: digital technology proliferation, and market focus on long-term sustainable development. The Board is confident AIA is well-positioned to capitalize on the significant

translation: opportunities in the region, providing financial security to customers and their families when needed, giving them peace of mind, while creating shared value for all stakeholders.

source_text: 最後，全賴客戶及股東的信任，友邦保險才能自上市以來表現強勁和持續增長。本人謹代表董事會全體成員，
translation: Finally, AIA's strong and sustained growth since listing is thanks to the trust of our customers and shareholders. On behalf of all Board members,
